bead.title: Run chaos_test.go against axon backend
bead.description: Parameterize cli/internal/bead/chaos_test.go (or add a sibling) to run the existing chaos suite against the axon backend in addition to JSONL. Fix any bugs uncovered in the axon backend until the suite is green.
bead.acceptance: 1. chaos_test.go (or chaos_axon_test.go) exercises the axon backend with the same scenarios (concurrent claims, crashes, dep-graph integrity). 2. go test -run Chaos ./cli/internal/bead/... passes for both backends. 3. Any bugs found are fixed in axon_backend.go, not papered over in tests.
